Localization.Description: An attempt to perform an operation on a listener of an application load balancer

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is changing listener {datafield6} of application load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted listener {datafield6} of application load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed listener {datafield6} of application load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is adding listener {datafield6} of application load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting listener {datafield6} of application load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change listener {datafield6} of an application load balancer on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to add listener {datafield6} of an application load balancer on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} added listener {datafield6} of application load balancer {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete listener {datafield6} of an application load balancer on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
